title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Housing.com - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Housing.com - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Housing.com in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
